name: OVARIAN VEIN THROMBOSIS
dominant_finding: tubular structure in location of ovarian vein with low-density center + peripheral
discriminating_features: tubular structure in location of ovarian vein with low-density center + peripheral

CT: tubular structure in location of ovarian vein with low-density center + peripheral

clinical.Cx: IVC thrombosis; pulmonary embolism (25%); septicemia; metastatic abscess formation
clinical.Rx: IV antibiotics + heparin; ligation of involved vessel at most proximal point of thrombosis
